title: Server: expand content-type inference + add raw-bytes document endpoint
description:
Extend crates/server/src/routes.rs:

1. infer_content_type() (line 340) recognizes .html / .htm → text/html.
2. New route GET /api/issues/:id/documents/:path/raw returns file bytes with Content-Type header set (not JSON-wrapped). Reuses executor.read_document_content() for path resolution.
3. Symmetric GET /api/documents/raw?path=… for path-only access (mirrors get_document_by_path).
4. Set CSP response header permitting https: so CDN-hosted assets (e.g. reveal.js from jsdelivr) work through the iframe.
5. Tests cover text/html inference; raw endpoint success; 404 on missing; correct bytes for a fixture.

Acceptance:
- curl of the raw endpoint on a .html document returns the file with Content-Type: text/html.
- Existing JSON content endpoint behavior unchanged.
- New tests green under cargo test -p jit-server.

Part of story abfd6016 (multi-format doc rendering). Unblocks task eeafaa78 (HtmlRenderer).
